Apartment_Buildings.description: Information about apartment buildings including address, name, description, and management contacts.

building_address.description: Full mailing address of the apartment building, including street, city, state, and ZIP code. Type: TEXT. Examples: '03743 Tammy Port Apt. 733 South Theresa, MT 50037', '43180 Jody Row Heatherland, MT 19442'.
examples: 03743 Tammy Port Apt. 733 South Theresa, MT 50037

building_description.description: Type or description of the building. Indicates the building style or category. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Studio', 'Duplex', 'Flat'.

building_full_name.description: Full official name of the apartment building or property management company. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Bradley-Sulliva', 'Larson, Mills a', 'Stuyvesant Town'.

building_manager.description: First name of the building manager responsible for the property. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Jonathan', 'Benjamin', 'Marie', 'Jennifer'.

building_phone.description: Contact phone number for the building management. Various formats. Type: TEXT. Examples: '253-407-0607', '001-849-829-1800x802', '(145)411-6406'.

building_short_name.description: Abbreviated or short name of the apartment building, often the same as building_full_name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Bradley-Sulliva', 'Stuyvesant Town'.

Apartments.description: Details of individual apartment units including type, room counts, and building association.

apt_number.description: Apartment unit number or identifier. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Apt. 503', 'Apt. 817', 'Apt. 852'.

apt_type_code.description: Type classification of the apartment unit. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Studio', 'Duplex', 'Flat'.

bathroom_count.description: Number of bathrooms in the apartment unit. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '1', '3'.

bedroom_count.description: Number of bedrooms in the apartment unit. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '3', '4', '5', '6'.

building_full_name.description: Full name of the building the apartment belongs to. References Apartment_Buildings.building_full_name. Type: TEXT.

building_short_name.description: Short name of the building the apartment belongs to. Type: TEXT.

room_count.description: Total number of rooms in the apartment unit. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '4', '6', '8', '9'.

Guests.description: Guest information for apartment booking records, including personal details.

date_of_birth.description: Date and time of birth of the guest. Type: TEXT (datetime string). Examples: '1969-09-04 08:01:32', '2013-03-07 05:31:21'.

gender_code.description: Gender of the guest. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Male', 'Female', 'Unknown'.

guest_first_name.description: First name of the guest. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Ashley', 'Karen', 'Amber', 'Christopher'.

guest_last_name.description: Last name of the guest. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Strickland', 'Roberson', 'Payne', 'Garcia'.

Apartment_Bookings.description: Booking records linking guests to apartment units with date ranges and status.

apt_number.description: Apartment unit number for this booking. References Apartments.apt_number. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Apt. 270', 'Apt. 199'.

booking_end_date.description: End date and time of the booking period. Type: TEXT (datetime string). Examples: '2019-12-06 02:24:23', '2021-04-12 00:46:50'.

booking_start_date.description: Start date and time of the booking period. Type: TEXT (datetime string). Examples: '2019-02-13 23:31:48', '2016-01-20 07:19:49'.

booking_status_code.description: Current status of the booking. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Provisional', 'Cancelled', 'Confirmed'.

guest_first_name.description: First name of the guest who made the booking. Type: TEXT.

guest_last_name.description: Last name of the guest who made the booking. Type: TEXT.

Apartment_Facilities.description: Facilities and amenities available in each apartment unit.

apt_number.description: Apartment unit number that has this facility. References Apartments.apt_number. Type: TEXT.

facility_code.description: Code or name of the facility/amenity available. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Cable TV', 'Gym', 'Swimming Pool', 'Balcony', 'Boardband', 'Laundry', 'Air Conditioning', 'Parking'.

View_Unit_Status.description: Status view of apartment units showing availability and booking date ranges.

apt_number.description: Apartment unit number. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Apt. 794', 'Apt. 411', 'Suite 645'.

available_yn.description: Whether the apartment unit is currently available. Type: TEXT. Values: '1' (available) or '0' (not available).

booking_end_date.description: End date and time of the associated booking. Type: TEXT (datetime string).

booking_start_date.description: Start date and time of the associated booking. Type: TEXT (datetime string).

status_date.description: Date and time when this status record was created or last updated. Type: TEXT (datetime string).
